raw_consumer_statement: Ordered merchandise on XX/XX/XXXX with the understanding I would receive it within XXXX days. I contacted the credit card company to have the charges reversed after XXXX days and the bill I received in late XXXX showed that the bill was reversed. However, the Citi Bank Credit paid them again. On XX/XX/XXXX I received a package and my wife was on vacation with her mom and I had someone helping me with the house. They signed for a package from XXXX and when I opened it and realized what it was I sent the package back That Day. After trying to get this settled For Months I canceled the card, even after they increased my credit limit without My Request, and I can not get anywhere with them even after sending them a copy of the Postal Receipt showing I did not have the merchandise.
